subcodes.first_line: O Siyyid-i-Qablí-Háshim! Calamities have encompassed Us from all sides by reason of that which the hands of the infidels have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سید قبل هاشم قد احاطتنا البلایا من کل الجهات بما اکتسبت ایادی الذین کفروا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
